title: rubus lejeunei subsp. emarginatus
intro: Rubus lejeunei subsp. emarginatus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Strawberry, is a type of wild raspberry native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus lejeunei subsp. emarginatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
